title: pilosella subfilifera
intro: Pilosella subfilifera, also known as the creeping buttercup, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family that thrives in moist, fertile soil and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Pilosella subfilifera lie in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve overall cardiovascular health. Pilosella subfilifera can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
